templates.name: STM32 MCU Base Spec
templates.description: Common STM32/GD32 MCU firmware spec set: AI Claude/Codex collaboration rules, Git/SVN dual-track version control, MCU C/C++ coding guidance, verification, data-flow, memory, UART DMA, RTOS ownership, optional UI/storage, command contracts, and MCU pitfalls knowledge base. Includes IAR Embedded Workbench and STM32CubeIDE/GCC notes where applicable.

templates.name: MCU Project Bootstrap
templates.description: Recoverable interactive skill that finishes project-root configuration after `trellis init -t mcu-stm32-base`: AGENTS.md managed block, .gitignore merge, doc/, version macros, svn:ignore merge, optional git remote binding without push.
